display_name.label: Display Name
display_name.help: The name used in JSON-LD. Defaults to the site title — override only if your brand name differs.

short_bio.label: Short Bio
short_bio.help: Falls back to the site tagline.

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.help: Longer about-us narrative. Not emitted in meta tags.

location.label: Location
location.help: Human-readable locality (e.g. 'New York, NY'). Structured address lives in Contact.

logo.label: Organization Logo
logo.help: Square logo used for JSON-LD + OG image fallback. Falls back to the site icon.

same_as.label: Linked Profiles
same_as.help: Social/profile URLs emitted as JSON-LD sameAs (Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.).
